//: The lowering runs on the Go/ttsc engine during the Bun.build emit (build.ts, via tsconfig.ttsc.json); this config drives the typecheck/lint (`bun x tsc`). The @rhombus-std/di.transformer + di.transformer.options declare-module augmentations enter the program via `types` so the authored registration/resolution forms in src/main.ts type-check with no transformer plugin — the tokenless forms are ordinary members with no type-level footprint. An explicit `types` array opts OUT of TypeScript's automatic ambient-@types discovery, so @types/bun is listed too -- the Generic Host's source (process.cwd()/process.stdout, node:path) reaches into this program via @rhombus-std/hosting, and without it plain `process`/`node:*` go unresolved (the without-transformer app never hits this because it leaves `types` unset and gets the repo-root @types/bun for free). The di family is dist-referenced (§72), so its `types` conditions resolve the built d.ts directly (the augmented core class cannot co-compile with di source). module:ESNext keeps relative + bare specifiers verbatim so node ESM resolves dist at runtime; the DOM lib supplies console + AbortSignal (the latter reached transitively through options → primitives).
